title: Ferny Spreading Blossom: batch 18 curation claim opened
body: Opened claim 1a6ae876-3b72-487b-b559-e6603a3d45a6 for legacy backlog batch 18 after live state showed 0 active claims and 0 active commit intents. Scope: next five pending legacy backlog entries from experience-audit emergent patterns through multi-agent-collaboration-protocol concept-home refinement. Processing in place only. No archive, split, shard, rename, move, or new buffer file.
